title: AvM Mod
description: This mod adds things from AvM (Animation VS Minecraft) into minecraft. Full credits go to - Alan Becker for making the youtube series.
body: Hello there and welcome to the AvM (Animation VS Animation) minecraft mod! Full credits go to Alan Becker on youtube for making the AvM Series. The AvM Series inspired me to make a mod, and why not make a minecraft mod based of what i like watching... ALAN BECKER! This mod adds: The AvM Staffs from episode 33 Lucky Block Staff. At the time of publishing this mod this mod has: Redstone Block Staff, Lapis Block Staff, Cobblestone Block Stafff and more, i hope you enjoy this mod! :D
